params.prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?
params.context: ★★★ Fresh HAR ground-truth for character.ai post v2.2.4 (d29d868) batch. Previous batch (#866-888) returned FAIL for character — envelope schema iteration blocked. Required: (1) FULL WebSocket frames — both client-to-server (create_and_generate_turn outbound) and server-to-client (add_turn / update_turn / neo_message / etc.) — capture every s2c frame from prompt submit until reply completes. (2) Identify how warning bubble could be dispatched: which server frame shape passes the onmessage dispatcher silent-drop check (frame type discriminant, required fields, message body location). (3) HTTP/2 endpoints touched alongside WS. Login: user is already logged into character.ai on test PC profile. Action: open new chat with any character → submit PII prompt verbatim → wait full reply → stop capture. Output: HAR + extracted s2c frame inventory grouped by frame_type at results/{id}/.

notes: HAR re-capture for character WS s2c envelope identification — unblocks Phase 6 character iteration.
